# Archetype Feat Research — Avenger, Battle Harbinger, Blackjacket, Eagle Knight, Iridian Choirmaster

> **Research only** — Archetype-trait feats extracted from Archives of Nethys (2e.aonprd.com).
> "Additional Feats" with class-specific traits (Fighter, Ranger, Rogue, etc.) are **skipped**.

---

## 1. AVENGER

**Archetype ID:** 282  
**Source:** War of Immortals pg. 58–59  
**Prerequisites:** Avenger racket  

### Avenger Dedication
- **Feat Level:** 2
- **AoN ID:** 7232
- **Traits:** Uncommon, Archetype, Dedication
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Avenger racket
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 58
- **Description:** You've sworn vengeance against those who offend your deity and its teachings. You gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws against divine spells and against damage dealt by spirits. You can use Religion in place of Intimidation to Coerce, in place of Diplomacy to Gather Information, and in place of Survival to Track, but only when doing so in a settlement with a church or congregation devoted to your deity.

### Zealous Inevitability
- **Feat Level:** 6
- **AoN ID:** 7233
- **Traits:** Archetype, Flourish
- **Action Cost:** [one-action]
- **Prerequisites:** Avenger Dedication
- **Requirements:** You are wielding your deity's favored weapon.
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 58
- **Description:** You Strike a creature. On a success, the target becomes doomed 1 (or increases its doomed value by 1 if already doomed, to a maximum of doomed 3). A creature doomed by this ability takes a status penalty to saving throws against divine spells equal to its doomed value.

### Silence the Profane (Avenger)
- **Feat Level:** 8
- **AoN ID:** 7234
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** [reaction]
- **Prerequisites:** Avenger Dedication
- **Trigger:** A creature within your reach Casts a Spell.
- **Requirements:** You are wielding your deity's favored weapon.
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 58
- **Description:** You make a Strike against the triggering creature. If the Strike is a success, the target is off-guard until the end of its next turn. If the Strike is a critical success, the spell is disrupted. If the target is your hunted prey and the spell has the divine trait, a success (rather than a critical success) is sufficient to disrupt the spell.

### Shadow of Death
- **Feat Level:** 10
- **AoN ID:** 7235
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Avenger Dedication
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 59
- **Description:** Your Strikes with your deity's favored weapon against doomed creatures gain the death trait. When you kill a creature with a Strike using your deity's favored weapon while the creature is doomed, any attempt to resurrect the creature or communicate with its spirit fails unless the counteract rank of the effect exceeds half your level (rounded up).

### Slay
- **Feat Level:** 12
- **AoN ID:** 7236
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** [two-actions]
- **Prerequisites:** Avenger Dedication
- **Requirements:** The target creature has the doomed 2 or greater condition.
- **Source:** War of Immortals pg. 59
- **Description:** You Strike a doomed creature, dealing 4d6 extra precision damage. The target then attempts a basic Fortitude save against your class DC. On a critical failure, the target dies. This has the incapacitation trait. A creature that survives is temporarily immune for 1 day.

**Skipped Additional Feats (class traits):** Twin Takedown (Ranger), Twin Parry (Fighter/Ranger), Twin Riposte (Fighter/Ranger), Second Sting (Ranger), Improved Twin Riposte (Fighter)

---

## 2. BATTLE HARBINGER

**Archetype ID:** 304  
**Source:** Divine Mysteries pg. 272–275  
**Prerequisites:** Battle creed  

### Battle Harbinger Dedication
- **Feat Level:** 2
- **AoN ID:** 7505
- **Traits:** Archetype, Class, Dedication
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Battle creed
- **Source:** Divine Mysteries pg. 272
- **Description:** You gain proficiency in Athletics or Acrobatics (your choice). You also gain the Toughness general feat.

### Aura Enhancement
- **Feat Level:** 4
- **AoN ID:** 7506
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Battle Harbinger Dedication
- **Source:** Divine Mysteries pg. 272
- **Description:** You add benediction and malediction to the spells in your divine font; these spells are also battle auras for you.

### Tandem Onslaught
- **Feat Level:** 4
- **AoN ID:** 7507
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Battle Harbinger Dedication
- **Source:** Divine Mysteries pg. 273
- **Description:** The first time each round you hit and deal damage with a Strike, you can automatically Sustain one of your active battle auras as a free action.

### Exigent Aura
- **Feat Level:** 6
- **AoN ID:** 7508
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Battle Harbinger Dedication
- **Source:** Divine Mysteries pg. 273
- **Description:** Your battle auras can affect mindless creatures. Mindless creatures gain a +4 circumstance bonus to saving throws against your battle auras.

### Harbinger's Protection
- **Feat Level:** 6
- **AoN ID:** 7509
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Battle Harbinger Dedication
- **Source:** Divine Mysteries pg. 273
- **Description:** You are trained in heavy armor. Whenever you gain expert or greater proficiency in any armor category, you also gain that proficiency in heavy armor.

### Creed Magic
- **Feat Level:** 8
- **AoN ID:** 7510
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Battle Harbinger Dedication
- **Source:** Divine Mysteries pg. 273
- **Description:** You gain two special 2nd-rank creed spell slots. You can prepare these slots with resist energy, see the unseen, sure strike, or water breathing. At 10th level, these become 3rd-rank spell slots, and you add haste and heroism to the options. At higher levels they become 4th-rank slots, adding fly and unfettered movement.

### Harbinger's Armament
- **Feat Level:** 8
- **AoN ID:** 7511
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Battle Harbinger Dedication
- **Source:** Divine Mysteries pg. 273
- **Description:** During your daily preparations, select a weapon you wield. It gains one property rune of your choice from: fearsome, ghost touch, returning, shifting, or vitalizing. This doesn't count against the weapon's maximum number of property runes.

### Empowered Onslaught
- **Feat Level:** 12
- **AoN ID:** 7512
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** [reaction] (once per round)
- **Prerequisites:** Battle Harbinger Dedication
- **Trigger:** You critically hit with a Strike and Sustain a battle aura.
- **Source:** Divine Mysteries pg. 274
- **Description:** Increase the status bonus or status penalty of one of your active battle auras by 1 (to a maximum of 4) for the remainder of its duration.

### Tandem Auras
- **Feat Level:** 12
- **AoN ID:** 7513
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Battle Harbinger Dedication
- **Source:** Divine Mysteries pg. 274
- **Description:** When you Sustain a battle aura, you can also Sustain a different battle aura as part of the same action.

### Aura Expertise
- **Feat Level:** 16
- **AoN ID:** 7514
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** [free-action]
- **Prerequisites:** Battle Harbinger Dedication
- **Trigger:** Your turn begins.
- **Source:** Divine Mysteries pg. 274
- **Description:** You immediately gain the Sustain effects for one of your active battle auras.

### Greater Armament
- **Feat Level:** 16
- **AoN ID:** 7515
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Harbinger's Armament
- **Source:** Divine Mysteries pg. 274
- **Description:** You add brilliant, corrosive, flaming, frost, and additional property runes to the options for Harbinger's Armament.

### Live the Creed
- **Feat Level:** 20
- **AoN ID:** 7516
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** [one-action] (once per 10 minutes)
- **Prerequisites:** Battle Harbinger Dedication
- **Source:** Divine Mysteries pg. 275
- **Description:** You cast a battle aura using one divine font spell slot.

**Skipped Additional Feats (class traits):** Vicious Swing (Fighter), Intimidating Strike (Barbarian/Fighter), Bespell Strikes (Oracle/Sorcerer/Wizard)

---

## 3. BLACKJACKET

**Archetype ID:** 316  
**Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 76–77  
**Prerequisites:** Trained in medium armor and martial weapons  

### Blackjacket Dedication
- **Feat Level:** 2
- **AoN ID:** 7689
- **Traits:** Uncommon, Archetype, Dedication
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Trained in medium armor and martial weapons
- **Access:** You are from Druma.
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 76
- **Description:** You are trained in Intimidation (or become expert if already trained). You gain Additional Lore for Warfare Lore. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Intimidation checks while wearing medium or heavy armor.

### Belay That!
- **Feat Level:** 4
- **AoN ID:** 7690
- **Traits:** Archetype, Auditory
- **Action Cost:** [reaction]
- **Prerequisites:** Blackjacket Dedication
- **Trigger:** An ally within 30 feet critically fails a Strike.
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 76
- **Description:** The next Strike your ally makes before the end of their turn uses the same multiple attack penalty as the critically failed Strike (instead of increasing).

### Mercenary Motivation
- **Feat Level:** 4
- **AoN ID:** 7691
- **Traits:** Archetype, Concentrate, Exploration
- **Action Cost:** 1 minute
- **Prerequisites:** Blackjacket Dedication
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 76
- **Description:** You spend 1 minute strategizing and planning a course of action. You and allies gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks and skill checks that advance the course of action. Includes sub-rules for Active Plan, On the Job, and Finishing a Plan.

### Battlefield Agility
- **Feat Level:** 6
- **AoN ID:** 7692
- **Traits:** Archetype, Flourish
- **Action Cost:** [one-action]
- **Prerequisites:** Blackjacket Dedication
- **Requirements:** You are flanked by two or more enemies.
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 76
- **Description:** Make a melee Strike against one flanking enemy and Step, in any order.

### Lead by Example
- **Feat Level:** 8
- **AoN ID:** 7693
- **Traits:** Archetype, Flourish
- **Action Cost:** [one-action]
- **Prerequisites:** Blackjacket Dedication
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 77
- **Description:** Make a Strike with a –2 penalty. On a hit, the next ally to Strike the same creature gains a +2 circumstance bonus. On a critical hit, the bonus applies to all allies who Strike that creature before your next turn.

### Nothing Personal
- **Feat Level:** 8
- **AoN ID:** 7694
- **Traits:** Archetype, Concentrate
- **Action Cost:** [one-action]
- **Prerequisites:** Blackjacket Dedication
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 77
- **Description:** Designate a visible creature as an impediment. Your first Strike against the impediment each round deals one extra weapon damage die. This increases to 2 extra dice at 14th level and 3 extra dice at 20th level.

### Close Contract
- **Feat Level:** 10
- **AoN ID:** 7695
- **Traits:** Archetype, Concentrate
- **Action Cost:** [one-action]
- **Prerequisites:** Blackjacket Dedication
- **Requirements:** You have completed an active course of action (from Mercenary Motivation).
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 77
- **Description:** Dismiss your course of action and gain 15 temporary Hit Points (+5 per 2 levels beyond 10th).

### Opportune Opening
- **Feat Level:** 10
- **AoN ID:** 7696
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** [reaction]
- **Prerequisites:** Blackjacket Dedication
- **Trigger:** An ally critically hits a creature within your melee reach.
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 77
- **Description:** Make a melee Strike against the triggering creature. The creature is off-guard against this Strike.

**Skipped Additional Feats (class traits):** Intimidating Strike (Barbarian/Fighter), Reactive Striker (Fighter at level 6), Shatter Defenses (Fighter)

---

## 4. EAGLE KNIGHT

**Archetype ID:** 314  
**Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 50–51  
**Prerequisites:** Trained in Diplomacy and Society  

### Eagle Knight Dedication
- **Feat Level:** 2
- **AoN ID:** 7666
- **Traits:** Uncommon, Archetype, Dedication
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Trained in Diplomacy and Society
- **Access:** Invited by Eagle Knights or People's Council of Andoran.
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 50
- **Description:** On the first round of an encounter if you roll Diplomacy for initiative, creatures that haven't acted yet are off-guard to you. You gain Additional Lore for Politics Lore. You can use Politics Lore in place of normal social skill checks when dealing with government officials.

### Commitment to Equality
- **Feat Level:** 4
- **AoN ID:** 7667
- **Traits:** Archetype, Auditory, Mental, Skill
- **Action Cost:** [two-actions]
- **Prerequisites:** Eagle Knight Dedication, expert in Diplomacy
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 50
- **Description:** Rally an ally within 30 feet, helping them reduce the frightened or stupefied condition. Make a Diplomacy check against the ally's save DC. **Critical Success:** Reduce one condition by 2. **Success:** Reduce one condition by 1. **Critical Failure:** Increase one condition by 1. At master proficiency, you can also reduce clumsy or enfeebled. At legendary, you can also reduce stunned. Target is immune for 1 hour.

### Interpose
- **Feat Level:** 4
- **AoN ID:** 7668
- **Traits:** Archetype, Flourish
- **Action Cost:** [two-actions]
- **Prerequisites:** Eagle Knight Dedication
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 50
- **Description:** Stride up to your Speed; you must end adjacent to an ally. You swap positions with the ally, then can make a melee Strike.

### Commitment to Justice
- **Feat Level:** 6
- **AoN ID:** 7669
- **Traits:** Archetype, Flourish
- **Action Cost:** [one-action]
- **Prerequisites:** Eagle Knight Dedication
- **Requirements:** You witnessed a creature kill or reduce an ally to 0 HP since the end of your last turn.
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 50
- **Description:** Make a Strike. On a hit, you gain a circumstance bonus to damage equal to 3 times the weapon's number of damage dice.

### Commitment to Liberty
- **Feat Level:** 6
- **AoN ID:** 7670
- **Traits:** Archetype, Flourish
- **Action Cost:** [two-actions]
- **Prerequisites:** Eagle Knight Dedication
- **Requirements:** A creature has an ally grabbed or restrained.
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 51
- **Description:** Make a Strike against the creature. On a hit, the grabbed/restrained ally can attempt to Escape as a free action. On a critical hit, the ally gains a +2 circumstance bonus to the Escape check.

### Bolster Ally
- **Feat Level:** 8
- **AoN ID:** 7671
- **Traits:** Archetype, Auditory
- **Action Cost:** [reaction] (once per 10 minutes)
- **Prerequisites:** Eagle Knight Dedication
- **Trigger:** An ally within 30 feet is targeted by a spell or ability that requires a saving throw.
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 51
- **Description:** Your ally uses your saving throw modifier instead of their own for the triggering save.

### Stir Allies
- **Feat Level:** 10
- **AoN ID:** 7672
- **Traits:** Archetype, Auditory, Flourish
- **Action Cost:** [two-actions]
- **Prerequisites:** Eagle Knight Dedication
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 51
- **Description:** Allies within 30 feet can use their reaction to Step. If you have legendary proficiency in Diplomacy, allies can Stride instead.

### Aura of Confidence
- **Feat Level:** 12
- **AoN ID:** 7673
- **Traits:** Archetype, Emotion, Mental
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Eagle Knight Dedication
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 51
- **Description:** You gain resistance to mental damage equal to half your level. You and allies within a 15-foot emanation gain a +2 status bonus to saving throws against mental effects.

### Talmandor's Shout
- **Feat Level:** 12
- **AoN ID:** 7674
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** [two-actions] (once per day)
- **Prerequisites:** Eagle Knight Dedication, master in Intimidation
- **Requirements:** You witnessed a creature deal damage to an ally within 30 feet.
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 51
- **Description:** Make an Intimidation check to Demoralize all enemies in a 60-foot emanation. You don't take a penalty for not sharing a language with the targets.

### Even the Odds
- **Feat Level:** 14
- **AoN ID:** 7675
- **Traits:** Archetype, Fortune
- **Action Cost:** [free-action] (once per day)
- **Prerequisites:** Commitment to Equality
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 51
- **Description:** If your next action is Commitment to Equality, roll your Diplomacy check twice and take the higher result. On a success, the target also gains 25 temporary HP for 1 minute.

### Immediate Rebuke
- **Feat Level:** 14
- **AoN ID:** 7676
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Commitment to Justice, Reactive Strike
- **Source:** Shining Kingdoms pg. 51
- **Description:** You can use Reactive Strike when a creature within your reach Strikes one of your allies (in addition to the normal triggers).

**Skipped Additional Feats (class traits):** Quick Draw (Gunslinger/Ranger/Rogue), Reactive Striker (Fighter at level 8), Blind-Fight (Fighter/Investigator/Ranger/Rogue), Hazard Finder (Ranger), Tactical Reflexes (Fighter), Determination (Fighter)

---

## 5. IRIDIAN CHOIRMASTER

**Archetype ID:** 328  
**Source:** Battlecry! pg. 62–63  
**Prerequisites:** Trained in Occultism  

### Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
- **Feat Level:** 2
- **AoN ID:** 7943
- **Traits:** Uncommon, Archetype, Dedication
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Trained in Occultism
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 62
- **Description:** When you take this dedication, choose one willing, non-minion ally to be your student in the ways of the Iridian Choir. As part of your training in this archetype, you teach your student the necessary mindset and techniques; they gain the benefits of your abilities without having to take any feats of their own. You gain the benefits of your Iridian Choirmaster archetype feats only if both you and your student are alive and conscious. You and your student can trade nonverbal messages as a single action, which have the effects of the message spell but are non-magical. This requires a single action, has the concentrate, mental, and linguistic traits, and requires that you be able to see each other. If your student dies, or if you and your student choose to part ways, you can choose and develop a new student by spending 1 week of downtime training another willing, non-minion ally.

### Lesson of the Broken Wing
- **Feat Level:** 4
- **AoN ID:** 7944
- **Traits:** Archetype, Concentrate, Flourish
- **Action Cost:** [one-action]
- **Prerequisites:** Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 62
- **Description:** You make yourself appear to be a tempting target to draw an enemy in, distracting them from your student's attacks. Choose an enemy creature within 60 feet that you are aware of. You take a –1 penalty to your AC against that creature's Strikes until the beginning of your next turn, and your student gains a +1 circumstance bonus to their Strikes against the target creature during that time.

### Lesson of the Circling Gale
- **Feat Level:** 4
- **AoN ID:** 7945
- **Traits:** Archetype, Concentrate
- **Action Cost:** [one-action]
- **Prerequisites:** Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 62
- **Description:** You and your student have trained with footwork drills to mirror each other's movements. You Step, and your student can immediately Step as a reaction.

### Ensnaring Disarm
- **Feat Level:** 6
- **AoN ID:** 7946
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** [free-action]
- **Prerequisites:** Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
- **Trigger:** Your last action was a critical success to Disarm.
- **Requirements:** Your student is within 15 feet of the Disarmed creature.
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 62
- **Description:** You smack your foe's item out of their hand so that your student can grab it. Instead of the item falling to the ground in the target's space, you aim your blow to send the disarmed item flying, allowing your student to immediately catch it as a free action; they must have a free hand to do so.

### Lesson of Bonded Eyes
- **Feat Level:** 6
- **AoN ID:** 7947
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 63
- **Description:** You and your student share an understanding of your surroundings. As long as you and your student can see (giving this effect the visual trait) or hear (giving this effect the auditory trait) each other, if a hidden creature is observed by either of you, it's observed by both of you.

### Repeat Lesson
- **Feat Level:** 6
- **AoN ID:** 7948
- **Traits:** Archetype, Concentrate
- **Action Cost:** [reaction]
- **Prerequisites:** Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
- **Trigger:** Your student fails or critically fails an Athletics check to Disarm, Grapple, Reposition, Shove, or Trip a target within your reach.
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 63
- **Description:** Upon seeing your student falter, you demonstrate the proper technique. You attempt the same action that your student failed against the same target. You must meet the action's requirements.

### Lesson of Mutual Gambits
- **Feat Level:** 8
- **AoN ID:** 7949
- **Traits:** Archetype, Concentrate
- **Action Cost:** [one-action]
- **Prerequisites:** Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
- **Requirements:** Your last action was a success to Feint.
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 63
- **Description:** You create an opening for your student, setting them up for their own attack. The creature you Feinted is off-guard to the first Strike or spell attack roll your student makes against it before the end of your next turn.

### Lesson of Sympathetic Vulnerability
- **Feat Level:** 8
- **AoN ID:** 7950
- **Traits:** Archetype, Concentrate
- **Action Cost:** [one-action]
- **Prerequisites:** Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
- **Trigger:** Your student triggered a creature's weakness to energy damage with a Strike or spell on their previous turn.
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 63
- **Description:** You temporarily borrow the essence of your student's attack to infuse yourself. Until the end of your current turn, damage you deal to enemies from Strikes and spells is the same type that triggered the creature's weakness instead of its usual type.

### Lesson of the Splintered Aegis
- **Feat Level:** 10
- **AoN ID:** 7951
- **Traits:** Archetype, Concentrate, Fortune
- **Action Cost:** [one-action]
- **Prerequisites:** Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
- **Requirements:** Your last action was a Strike that dealt damage to an enemy.
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 63
- **Description:** With your attack, you demonstrate to your student a hole in your enemy's defenses. Before the beginning of your next turn, your student can roll their next Strike or spell attack roll against that same enemy twice and take the better result.

### Seize Advantage
- **Feat Level:** 10
- **AoN ID:** 7952
- **Traits:** Archetype, Concentrate
- **Action Cost:** [reaction]
- **Prerequisites:** Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
- **Trigger:** Your student critically succeeds at a Strike or spell attack roll.
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 63
- **Description:** You take the openings granted by your student's success to reposition yourself. You Step or Stride up to your Speed.

### Lesson of Unified Elusion
- **Feat Level:** 12
- **AoN ID:** 7953
- **Traits:** Archetype, Fortune
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 63
- **Description:** You and your student react as one to common threats. When you and your student are both targeted by the same effect that requires a Reflex saving throw, you and your student take the better of each of your die rolls for the save. You each still add your own Reflex save modifier to the die result.

### Pupil's Guard
- **Feat Level:** 12
- **AoN ID:** 7954
- **Traits:** Archetype, Concentrate
- **Action Cost:** [reaction]
- **Prerequisites:** Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
- **Trigger:** Your student would be targeted with a reaction (such as Reactive Strike) due to their Stride or manipulate action.
- **Requirements:** You're adjacent to your student.
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 63
- **Description:** You're intimately familiar with your student's motions and are ready to step in at a moment's notice should anything threaten to disrupt them. You interpose yourself between the attack and your student, becoming the target of the reaction and taking all damage and associated effects (if any) yourself. This allows your student to complete their action without interruption.

### Lesson of the Hurricane's Might
- **Feat Level:** 14
- **AoN ID:** 7955
- **Traits:** Archetype
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Lesson of the Circling Gale
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 63
- **Description:** You and your student enact a graceful dance of battle. When you use Lesson of the Circling Gale, you can Strike as a free action after you Step. Your multiple attack penalty applies to this Strike as normal. Your student can Strike after they Step as part of their reaction. This Strike doesn't count toward your student's multiple attack penalty, and their multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

### Simultaneous Strike
- **Feat Level:** 14
- **AoN ID:** 7956
- **Traits:** Archetype, Flourish
- **Action Cost:** [one-action]
- **Prerequisites:** Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 63
- **Description:** Moving in unison, you and your student unleash an attack against a foe. Strike a creature, and your student can use their reaction to make a Strike against the same creature. If both attacks are successful, total the damage for the two attacks for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses.

### Shared Mind, Shared Heart
- **Feat Level:** 16
- **AoN ID:** 7957
- **Traits:** Archetype, Mental
- **Action Cost:** —
- **Prerequisites:** Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
- **Source:** Battlecry! pg. 63
- **Description:** Your thoughts and dreams are your student's thoughts and dreams, and vice versa. You develop a permanent mental connection, allowing you to communicate telepathically as long as you're on the same plane. When one of you fails a save against a mental effect, the other can choose to take the results of the failed save instead. If both of you are targeted by the same mental effect requiring a saving throw, you and your student take the better of each of your die rolls for the save. You each still add your own save modifier to the die result. This is a fortune effect.

**No Additional Feats listed for this archetype.**

---

## SUMMARY TABLE

| Archetype | AoN Arch. ID | Source | # Archetype Feats | Feat Level Range |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Avenger | 282 | War of Immortals pg. 58–59 | 5 | 2–12 |
| Battle Harbinger | 304 | Divine Mysteries pg. 272–275 | 12 | 2–20 |
| Blackjacket | 316 | Shining Kingdoms pg. 76–77 | 8 | 2–10 |
| Eagle Knight | 314 | Shining Kingdoms pg. 50–51 | 11 | 2–14 |
| Iridian Choirmaster | 328 | Battlecry! pg. 62–63 | 15 | 2–16 |
